channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Notion takes a quiet approach to designing AI features: 'You can't have every new tool screaming at you'
item.description: Design head Randy Hunt says there are other ways to drive awareness or adoption than making all features immediately present.

item.title: When SpaceX starts trading, some 'shareholders' will discover they own nothing at all
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: How Elon Musk sold a $1.77 trillion dream—and what other CEOs can learn from the SpaceX IPO
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Study links iPhone to declining U.S. fertility rate, citing increased screen time and social isolation
item.description: A recent NBER paper suggests a connection between iPhone sales and fewer births, possibly due to more time on devices and less human interaction.
